rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §38.007, which governs alcohol-free school zones and school district alcohol policies.
quote: Sec. 38.007. ALCOHOL-FREE SCHOOL ZONES. (a) The board of trustees of a school district shall prohibit the use of alcoholic beverages at a school-related or school-sanctioned activity on or off school property.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and alcohol-free school zone statute.
